title: 开源软件许可证变更评估

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] Redis/Valkey迁移评估万户级计划已制定，包含配额、1:10分解口径与回报周期。

tumen_quota.target: 1 unit of Redis to Valkey Technical Evaluation Report
tumen_quota.scope: Comprehensive assessment covering Redis license change, Valkey project overview, technical compatibility, cloud provider support, community migration experience, roadmap, and health status, as detailed in the user task.

decomposition_rule.tumen_mingghan: 1 Tumen unit (Technical Evaluation Report) will be decomposed into 10 Mingghan sub-tasks. These Mingghan tasks will cover the 6 specific research areas and 4 report section drafting/analysis tasks (e.g., M1: Research Redis License Change, ..., M7: Draft Redis License Analysis & Valkey Overview, etc.).
decomposition_rule.mingghan_jaghun: Each Mingghan unit will be further decomposed into 10 Jaghun sub-tasks. These will focus on detailed data collection (e.g., specific web_search queries, web_fetch operations) and initial analysis for their respective Mingghan topic.
decomposition_rule.jaghun_arban: Each Jaghun unit will be further decomposed into 10 Arban sub-tasks. These will focus on granular information extraction, fact verification, and preliminary summarization.

reporting_cycle.tumen_level: Final 'Redis to Valkey Technical Evaluation Report' submission upon completion of all underlying sub-tasks.
reporting_cycle.mingghan_level: Weekly progress reports detailing status of research and drafting for each Mingghan task.
reporting_cycle.jaghun_level: Bi-daily updates on specific data collection efforts and initial analysis findings.
reporting_cycle.arban_level: Daily micro-updates on information extraction and verification tasks.

risks.description: Web automation tools (web_search, web_fetch) may be unavailable or return empty results, as indicated by the previous stage's web_scan failure ('no available browser tab'). This could severely impede data collection.
risks.mitigation: Subsequent execution stages (tumen_level_execute and below) must implement robust error handling for web tools, including re-attempting queries with different keywords. If persistent unavailability occurs, they should report 'objective unreachable' for specific data points or escalate for manual intervention/alternative data sources (e.g., internal knowledge bases if available in those stages).

risks.description: Information scarcity, conflicting data, or lack of authoritative sources from web searches, especially for future roadmaps or specific technical comparisons.
risks.mitigation: Execution stages should prioritize cross-referencing multiple sources, clearly document any discrepancies or unverified information, and highlight areas where data is limited in the final report.

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

<summary>记忆管理SOP已在长期记忆中，无需新增或修改。</summary>


我已仔细审查了L0记忆管理SOP的内容，并与当前的 `global_mem_insight.txt` 进行了比对。我确认L0记忆管理SOP的核心原则、流程概要和文件结构等关键信息已经完整且准确地记录在长期记忆的“L3: Memory Management (Meta-SOP)”部分。因此，从我最近一次读取SOP的任务中，没有新的、未被记录的“事实验证成功且长期有效”的信息需要添加到长期记忆中。按照“若已在更新记忆过程或没有值得记忆的点，忽略本次调用”的原则，本次无需对记忆文件进行修改。

arban_allocations.title: Research Redis License Change Details
arban_allocations.description: Investigate the specific license change of Redis in March 2024, identifying the previous license (BSD) and the new license, along with the stated reasons for the change. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Analyze Valkey Project Origin and Governance
arban_allocations.description: Research the origins of the Valkey project, its founding principles, and its current governance model. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Examine Valkey's Relationship with Redis
arban_allocations.description: Detail the historical and technical relationship between Valkey and Redis, including its fork point and key differences in project philosophy. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility: API and Protocol
arban_allocations.description: Compare the API and protocol compatibility between Redis and Valkey, identifying any known discrepancies or divergences. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compatibility: Data Formats
arban_allocations.description: Analyze the data format compatibility between Redis and Valkey, ensuring seamless data migration potential. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support: AWS ElastiCache
arban_allocations.description: Research the official support status and offerings for Valkey on AWS ElastiCache. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Cloud Provider Support: Google Memorystore & Others
arban_allocations.description: Research the official support status and offerings for Valkey on Google Memorystore and other major cloud providers (e.g., Azure Cache for Redis). This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Community Migration Experiences and Issues
arban_allocations.description: Gather information on existing community experiences with migrating from Redis to Valkey, focusing on common challenges and solutions. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Valkey Roadmap and Future Development
arban_allocations.description: Investigate Valkey's current development roadmap, planned features, and future direction. This is a read-only research task.

arban_allocations.title: Valkey Community Health Assessment
arban_allocations.description: Assess the overall health and activity of the Valkey community, including contributor engagement, issue resolution, and documentation quality. This is a read-only research task.
